title: Dryopsis heterolaena
taxonomy: Dryopsis heterolaena is classified within the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as the wood fern family. This classification places it within the order Polypodiales and the class Polypodiopsida. The genus Dryopsis is further divided into several species, with Dryopsis heterolaena being one of the recognized species. It shares similarities with other ferns within the Dryopteridaceae family, which are predominantly native to Asia and North America. The classification of Dryopsis heterolaena reflects its evolutionary relationships with other ferns in the same family.
